subcodes.title: Words spoken at Theosophical Society in San Francisco, 1912-10-11
subcodes.first_line: Human spirits are manifested in physical molds or bodies. One spirit may be imperfect; that is to say, it may be imbued with qualities
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @the human soul, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @spiritual transformation
